subtitle: Manage installations, team access, and platform settings.

customerOverview.title: Overview
customerOverview.subtitle: Your company's AI modules, installations, and team — scoped to your organization only.
customerOverview.installFirstNote: Daily AI work happens inside your installed systems. This Control Center is for configuration, installs, and team management.

modules.install: Connect and monitor your Aipify installation.

support.title: Support

support.description: Support-AI svarer automatisk på almindelige kundespørgsmål og eskalerer vigtige sager, når det er nødvendigt.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track performance and business insights.
analytics.description: Aipify Analytics identificerer tendenser, muligheder og vigtige ændringer i din virksomhed.

commerce.title: Commerce
commerce.subtitle: Commerce AI tools and sales intelligence.
commerce.description: Commerce-AI optimerer produkter, priser og rentabilitet.

notifications.title: Notifications

notifications.description: Administrer advarsler fra installationer, fakturering, integrationer og AI-anbefalinger.

controlCenter.installFirstNote: Daily AI work happens inside your installed systems. Use this dashboard to provision installs and manage your Aipify account.
